name: Seagate Technology Holdings plc
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc is a leading provider of data storage technology and infrastructure solutions. Its principal products are hard disk drives (HDDs), along with solid state drives (SSDs), storage subsystems, and the Lyve platform—a scalable edge-to-cloud mass data platform offering data transfer shuttles and storage-as-a-service. Seagate designs and manufactures key HDD components including read/write heads and recording media, serving cloud, enterprise, and legacy consumer markets.

products.name: Hard Disk Drives (HDDs)
products.description: Primary mass storage devices for cloud, enterprise, and legacy markets using magnetic recording technology.

products.name: Solid State Drives (SSDs)
products.description: NAND flash memory-based storage devices supporting SATA, SAS, and NVMe interfaces.

products.name: Storage Subsystems
products.description: Enterprise and cloud storage subsystems built with Seagate HDDs and SSDs for scalable environments.

products.name: Lyve Shuttle
products.description: Data transfer solution enabling enterprises to move massive data volumes from endpoints to the cloud.

products.name: Lyve Cloud
products.description: Storage-as-a-service cloud offering providing frictionless mass capacity storage at the metro edge.

products.name: Mozaic Platform
products.description: Industry-first implementation of heat-assisted magnetic recording (HAMR) technology for high-capacity HDDs.

products.name: MACH.2
products.description: Multi-actuator HDD technology designed to optimize throughput for high-capacity drives.

partnerships.description: OEMs bundle and package Seagate storage solutions into end-user applications and systems.
CSPs use Seagate products for scale-out storage and cloud-based solutions for businesses.

people.name: C.J. Muse
people.role: Analyst, Cantor Fitzgerald  Wamsi Mohan  Analyst, BofA Securities

people.name: Krish Sankar
people.role: Analyst, TD Cowen  Steven B. Fox  Analyst, Fox Advisors LLC
